name: Dialogue And Voice Fixtures
description: Propose a curated benchmark_fixture_library addition set for dialogue and voice fixtures.
related_rules: All evaluation components MUST map to entries in evaluation_library, benchmark_fixture_library, failure_mode_library, voice_library, and cadence_library.
Benchmarks MUST include long-form narrative and multi-turn dialogue fixtures with seeded continuity and memory challenges.
Human-like quality MUST be operationalized via multi-dimensional rubrics including coherence, continuity, dialogue realism, style consistency, and human-likeness discrimination.
Voice preservation and style drift metrics MUST be applied before and after any automated editing or post-processing step.
related_validators: For editing pipelines, measure voice preservation and semantic fidelity before enabling new editors in production.
Monitor style consistency dashboards to detect unexpected voice drift across releases.
Periodically re-calibrate automated evaluators against human rubric benchmarks for both narrative and dialogue.
related_failure_modes: Dialogue metrics overweight semantic similarity, penalizing creative or diverse responses.
Editing pipelines slowly erode voice through cumulative small changes that evade single-step checks.
